mapper.update:
UPDATE biz_workorder_quote
quotation_no=#{quotationNo}, commercial_amount=#{commercialAmount}, compulsory_amount=#{compulsoryAmount}, vehicle_and_tax_amount=#{vehicleAndTaxAmount}, non_motor_amount=#{nonMotorAmount}, non_motor_insurance_name=#{nonMotorInsuranceName}, non_motor_coverage_amount=#{nonMotorCoverageAmount}, quotation_remark=#{quotationRemark}, quotation_failed_remark=#{quotationFailedRemark}, quotation_time=FROM_UNIXTIME(#{quotationTime}), updated_at=updated_at
WHERE workorder_id=#{id} AND deleted=0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_workorder_quote(enterprise_id,workorder_id,quotation_no,commercial_amount,compulsory_amount,vehicle_and_tax_amount, non_motor_amount,non_motor_insurance_name,non_motor_coverage_amount,quotation_remark,quotation_failed_remark,quotation_time,deleted) VALUES(#{enterpriseId},#{id},#{quotationNo},#{commercialAmount},#{compulsoryAmount},#{vehicleAndTaxAmount},#{nonMotorAmount}, #{nonMotorInsuranceName},#{nonMotorCoverageAmount},#{quotationRemark},#{quotationFailedRemark}, CASE WHEN #{quotationTime} IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE FROM_UNIXTIME(#{quotationTime}) END,0)
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_workorder_commission SET compute_type=CASE WHEN #{side}='UPSTREAM' THEN #{workorder.upstreamComputeType} ELSE #{workorder.downstreamComputeType} END, commercial_percentage=CASE WHEN #{side}='UPSTREAM' THEN #{workorder.upstreamCommercialPercentage} ELSE #{workorder.downstreamCommercialPercentage} END, compulsory_percentage=CASE WHEN #{side}='UPSTREAM' THEN #{workorder.upstreamCompulsoryPercentage} ELSE #{workorder.downstreamCompulsoryPercentage} END, vehicle_tax_percentage=CASE WHEN #{side}='UPSTREAM' THEN #{workorder.upstreamVehicleAndVesselTaxPercentage} ELSE #{workorder.downstreamVehicleAndVesselTaxPercentage} END, non_motor_percentage=CASE WHEN #{side}='UPSTREAM' THEN #{workorder.upstreamNonMotorPercentage} ELSE #{workorder.downstreamNonMotorPercentage} END, commercial_amount=CASE WHEN #{side}='UPSTREAM' THEN #{workorder.upstreamCommercialAmount} ELSE #{workorder.downstreamCommercialAmount} END, compulsory_amount=CASE WHEN #{side}='UPSTREAM' THEN #{workorder.upstreamCompulsoryAmount} ELSE #{workorder.downstreamCompulsoryAmount} END, vehicle_tax_amount=CASE WHEN #{side}='UPSTREAM' THEN #{workorder.upstreamVehicleAndVesselTaxAmount} ELSE #{workorder.downstreamVehicleAndVesselTaxAmount} END, non_motor_amount=CASE WHEN #{side}='UPSTREAM' THEN #{workorder.upstreamNonMotorAmount} ELSE #{workorder.downstreamNonMotorAmount} END WHERE workorder_id=#{workorder.id} AND side=#{side} AND deleted=0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_workorder_commission(enterprise_id,workorder_id,side,compute_type,commercial_percentage,compulsory_percentage, vehicle_tax_percentage,non_motor_percentage,commercial_amount,compulsory_amount,vehicle_tax_amount,non_motor_amount,deleted) VALUES(#{workorder.enterpriseId},#{workorder.id},#{side}, CASE WHEN #{side}='UPSTREAM' THEN #{workorder.upstreamComputeType} ELSE #{workorder.downstreamComputeType} END, CASE WHEN #{side}='UPSTREAM' THEN #{workorder.upstreamCommercialPercentage} ELSE #{workorder.downstreamCommercialPercentage} END, CASE WHEN #{side}='UPSTREAM' THEN #{workorder.upstreamCompulsoryPercentage} ELSE #{workorder.downstreamCompulsoryPercentage} END, CASE WHEN #{side}='UPSTREAM' THEN #{workorder.upstreamVehicleAndVesselTaxPercentage} ELSE #{workorder.downstreamVehicleAndVesselTaxPercentage} END, CASE WHEN #{side}='UPSTREAM' THEN #{workorder.upstreamNonMotorPercentage} ELSE #{workorder.downstreamNonMotorPercentage} END, CASE WHEN #{side}='UPSTREAM' THEN #{workorder.upstreamCommercialAmount} ELSE #{workorder.downstreamCommercialAmount} END, CASE WHEN #{side}='UPSTREAM' THEN #{workorder.upstreamCompulsoryAmount} ELSE #{workorder.downstreamCompulsoryAmount} END, CASE WHEN #{side}='UPSTREAM' THEN #{workorder.upstreamVehicleAndVesselTaxAmount} ELSE #{workorder.downstreamVehicleAndVesselTaxAmount} END, CASE WHEN #{side}='UPSTREAM' THEN #{workorder.upstreamNonMotorAmount} ELSE #{workorder.downstreamNonMotorAmount} END,0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE biz_workorder_payment
required_pay_amount=#{requiredPayAmount}, payee_staff_id=#{payeeStaffId}, payee_name=#{payName}, payee_phone=#{payIdNum}, merchant_bank=#{payBank}, merchant_bank_card_num=#{payBankCardNum}, pay_remark=#{payRemark}, pay_failed_remark=#{payFailedRemark}, updated_at=updated_at
WHERE workorder_id=#{id} AND deleted=0

UPDATE biz_workorder_underwriting
underwriting_remark=#{underwritingRemark}, underwriting_failed_remark=#{underwritingFailedRemark}, underwriting_time=FROM_UNIXTIME(#{underwritingTime}), commercial_policy_no=#{commercialPolicyNo}, compulsory_policy_no=#{compulsoryPolicyNo}, accept_insurance_remark=#{acceptInsuranceRemark}, accept_insurance_failed_remark=#{acceptInsuranceFailedRemark}, finish_time=FROM_UNIXTIME(#{finishTime}), updated_at=updated_at
WHERE workorder_id=#{id} AND deleted=0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_workorder_underwriting(enterprise_id,workorder_id,underwriting_remark,underwriting_failed_remark,underwriting_time, commercial_policy_no,compulsory_policy_no,accept_insurance_remark,accept_insurance_failed_remark,finish_time,deleted) VALUES(#{enterpriseId},#{id},#{underwritingRemark},#{underwritingFailedRemark}, CASE WHEN #{underwritingTime} IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE FROM_UNIXTIME(#{underwritingTime}) END, #{commercialPolicyNo},#{compulsoryPolicyNo},#{acceptInsuranceRemark},#{acceptInsuranceFailedRemark}, CASE WHEN #{finishTime} IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE FROM_UNIXTIME(#{finishTime}) END,0)
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_workorder_logistics SET tracking_num=#{trackingNum},logistics_company=#{logisticsCompany} WHERE workorder_id=#{id} AND deleted=0
